content: Unified OCR failure recovery to use WorkQueueRepository abstraction instead of hardcoded UUID + raw SQL. Added QueueType::OcrError variant, updated workflow_repo.rs match, replaced upload_invoice error queuing block with get_by_type + move_item pattern, removed OCR_ERROR_QUEUE_ID constant, added tracing::error! for missing queue. Seed data in state.rs updated from "exception" to "ocr_error" queue_type. Integration tests in ocr_error_queue_test.rs.
summary: OCR error queue: unified to use WorkQueueRepository with QueueType::OcrError variant
